text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I escort Meisho Doto to the infirmary after she
suffers an injury during training.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry! I'm so sorry! I'm always causing you
trouble... Oogh.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I promise I'll be back to training as soon
as—Ouch!
choice_data_list: If you're in pain, let's call it a day.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but... I won't have any confidence to spare if I
stop now...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I can still keep going! This injury won't h-hold me
down!
choice_data_list: I'd rather see you rest right now.
Do you want to try heading back for training?
Do you want to try heading back for training?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I can still keep going! This injury won't h-hold me
back!
choice_data_list: I'd rather see you rest right now.
Do you want to try heading back for training?
Do you want to try heading back for training?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But, I really can't stand to stay put... If the pain
gets too bad, I'll stop. So, please!
choice_data_list:
Training now might slow down the healing
process.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: W-well...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: All right... I'll get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Guh... I've made a big mess of things with this
injury... I'm so sorry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto swallows her disappointment,
choosing to rest until she's fully healed.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, of course! Thank you so much, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Promise me you won't push yourself.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I p-promise! I'll stop if the pain gets too much!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Careful now... It should be fine if I don't use too
much strength.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-owowowwww!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
That was a fraction of my strength... Urk, I can't
walk like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Exerting any level of force seems to be a taxing
endeavor, and her injury only worsens.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I... think I can manage still. With just a bit
more effort, maybe—
choice_data_list: I want you to take it easy!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-yes! That's right. I have that... promise to keep!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto keeps her strength in check,
successfully returning to practice!
